footer.tagline: Live the sea experience in Puerto Peñasco. Unique boat tours for the whole family.

hero.title: Set sail with us!
hero.subtitle: The sea adventure awaits you in Puerto Peñasco. Unique pirate boat tours for the whole family.

packages.subtitle: Choose the one that best fits your group

video.subtitle: Enjoy the experience that awaits you before you even arrive

reviews.title: What our
reviews.cta: I want to live this! Book now

placeholders.author: Carlos López
placeholders.text: Best family experience in Puerto Peñasco. The kids loved their pirate costumes, the dinner was amazing and the captain was incredibly friendly.

placeholders.author: Andrea Sánchez
placeholders.text: The fire show blew our minds. Worth every penny — we'd go back tomorrow. Coming back with all our friends!

placeholders.author: Roberto Torres
placeholders.text: A magical night at sea. The food, the music and the atmosphere exceeded all our expectations.

placeholders.author: María Flores
placeholders.text: We celebrated my daughter's birthday here and it was perfect. The crew went above and beyond to make it special.

placeholders.author: Juan Mendoza
placeholders.text: Incredible sunset from the boat. The photos turned out spectacular. 100% recommended!

gallery.title: Experience gallery
gallery.subtitle: Real moments from our passengers on board

finalCta.title: Ready to set sail?
finalCta.subtitle: Book your tour today and live the most exciting pirate adventure in Puerto Peñasco.

reservation.pageSubtitle: Book in 3 simple steps. Availability is shown live.
reservation.step1: When do you want to set sail?
reservation.peopleHint: Groups of {{min}}+ get 10% off · Maximum capacity: {{capacity}}

errors.title: Your reservation could not be completed
errors.capacity: Oops, while you were filling out the form someone else booked that time slot and there's no longer enough capacity. Choose another time or reduce the number of people.
errors.invalidSlot: The selected time is not available. Pick one of the 5 daily time slots.

info.cancellationDetail: up to 24 h before the tour. Full refund, no questions asked.
info.arrivalDetail: before departure at the Puerto Portuario dock.

trust.secure: Payment by transfer or at the office
trust.cancellation: Free cancellation up to 24 h before

costume.label: Pirate costume for kids
costume.desc: Hat, eye patch and toy sword

datePicker.label: Tour date
datePicker.hint: Bookings available up to 90 days in advance. Closed on Mondays.

timePicker.label: Time
timePicker.errorLoading: Could not load availability. Try again.
timePicker.hint: Availability refreshes every few seconds. Maximum capacity: {{capacity}} people per time slot.

con_comida.label: Dinner & Open Bar
con_comida.description: Adults: Dinner buffet + open bar · Teens: Dinner, soda & bottled water

solo_bebidas.label: Open Bar
solo_bebidas.description: Adults: Open bar on board · Teens: Sodas & bottled water

ninos.label: Kids Package
ninos.description: Bottled water, sodas & pizza on board (ages 3–11)

confirmation.title: Request Received
confirmation.subtitle: Your reservation is pending confirmation. We'll contact you via WhatsApp to confirm it and share payment details.

payment.title: Payment Information
payment.paidSubtitle: This reservation has already been processed.
payment.cashInfo: Pay in cash directly at the dock when boarding. Please arrive 30 minutes before your departure time.
payment.transferInfo: Make a bank transfer before your tour and send us the receipt via WhatsApp.
payment.transferReferenceHint: Enter the reference number from your bank transfer.
payment.errorLoadingReservation: We couldn't load your reservation data. Please try again.
payment.reservationCancelledDetail: This reservation was cancelled and payment cannot be processed.

email.title: Email for your receipt
email.description: We'll send your reservation summary to this address.
email.errRequired: Enter your email to receive the receipt.

receipt.title: Payment successful!
receipt.subtitle: Keep this receipt as proof of your reservation.
receipt.subtitlePending: Present this receipt on the day of the tour.
receipt.emailSent: We sent a copy of your receipt to {{email}}.
receipt.emailSimulated: Demo mode: delivery to {{email}} was simulated (no mail provider configured).

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters
validation.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number (10 digits)
validation.datePast: Date cannot be earlier than today
validation.dateFuture: Reservations cannot be made more than {{days}} days in advance
validation.peopleMin: There must be at least 1 person
